args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close">"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close"<"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close"="Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','NYA','IXIC') AND "Date" LIKE '2018%' GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close">"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close"<"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close"="Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','NYA','IXIC') AND "Date" LIKE '2018%' GROUP BY "Index";

result.preview: "GSPTSE \u2014 44 up days, 41 down days\nIXIC \u2014 44 up days, 31 down days"
